items.title: Project Valhalla, Explained: How a Decade of Work Arrives in JDK 28

items.title: DuckDB Internals: Why Is DuckDB Fast? (Part 1)
items.desc: Walk through DuckDB's internals: how it skips serialization overhead, parses and optimizes SQL, and stores data in columnar row groups with zone maps.

items.title: To study how chips work, MIT researchers built their own operating system

items.title: I found 10k GitHub repositories distributing Trojan malware
items.desc: This is the story of how I found 10,000 repositories on GitHub that distribute Trojan malware. They are all from different contributors, have different names, and are not forks of other repositories.
